caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, brown suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, textured wig speaks into a professional microphone. He wears glasses and black over-ear headphones. The setting is a studio or store with white walls covered in framed photographs and clothing racks with garments, including a yellow shirt labeled "LEE". A black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his right hand, which becomes more visible as he lifts it to emphasize his words. His facial expression shifts as he continues to talk, while the background and equipment remain static.
